content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
geli ai xolo de nikan i gisun be mujakv sain i taqiha
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

### This sentence appears to be in Manchu, an endangered Tungusic language. The translation provided below is an attempt based on available resources and may not be entirely accurate due to the complexity and limited accessibility of the language. The sentence seems to refer to a statement or a quote from a person or a group of people. Here is my attempt at translation: "He said that the words of the Han people are very beautiful." ###
